meta.compliance_note: All attributes derived from non-race-outcome sources only. No finishing positions, time gaps, stage results, or race-derived metrics used. Specialist classifications based on team role declarations and publicly available athlete profiles. Recovery dynamics set to unobserved for all riders — no physiological test data available in public domain.

provenance.source: procyclingstats.com specialist classifications; cyclinguptodate.com startlist (retrieved 2026-05-04); team press releases and role declarations; publicly available athlete physique profiles. NO race outcome data (finishing positions, time gaps, stage results) used.
